hero.title: Stats for your Discord bot
hero.description: Discord Analytics is a powerful analytics tool for Discord bots that allows you to monitor and track your bot's activity in depth.

teams.title: A collaborative platform
teams.description: Invite your teammates to access your bot's stats

graphs.title: A ton of graphs
graphs.description: Dozens of interactive graphs: user growth, command usage, server activity, and more.

votes.title: All your votes in one place
votes.description: Merge all your votes webhooks one

email.title: Email reports
email.description: Your weekly report every sunday in your mailbox

achievements.title: Time to flex
achievements.description: Flex hard – craft unique achievements or grab fan-favorites from the Community Store.

custom_graphs.title: Your bot, your stats
custom_graphs.description: Create the graphs that fit the most your bot

community.title: ...but it's also you!
community.description: Discord Analytics is completely free and funded by your donations. The use of these funds is fully transparent thanks to public access to the transaction history.

1.question: Is Discord Analytics free?
1.answer: Yes, and as long as our costs allow it, Discord Analytics will remain completely free.

2.question: What languages and libraries does Discord Analytics support?
2.answer: Discord Analytics currently supports JavaScript and Python, and we are working on adding more languages and libraries.
2.link: See our documentation for more information.

3.question: How can I contact Discord Analytics?

answer.1: Our team is ready to answer your questions on our

4.question: What are the service limits?
4.answer: By default, you are limited to 3 bots, servers or activities. This limit can be increased on request. To do so, please contact our teams.

5.question: How can I contribute to Discord Analytics?
5.answer: You can help us by translating Discord Analytics into other languages, or by extending the compatibility of our services to new languages and libraries.
